ns0:entry.ns0:title: a5c-ai/babysitter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/a5c-ai/babysitter
Language: javascript
Babysitter enforces obedience on agentic workforces and enables them to manage extremely complex tasks and workflows through deterministic, hallucination-free self-orchestration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: affaan-m/ECC
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC
Language: javascript
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Remote MCP Server that securely connects Jira and Confluence with your LLM, IDE, or agent platform of choice.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/react
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/react
Language: javascript
The library for web and native user interfaces.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: greensock/GSAP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/greensock/GSAP
Language: javascript
GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform), a JavaScript animation library for the modern web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jo-inc/camofox-browser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jo-inc/camofox-browser
Language: javascript
Stealth headless browser for AI agents — bypass Cloudflare, bot detection, and anti-scraping. Drop-in Puppeteer/Playwright replacement.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: orangecoding/fredy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/orangecoding/fredy
Language: javascript
❤️ Fredy - [F]ind [R]eal [E]state [D]amn Eas[y] - Fredy keeps searching for new apartments, houses, and flats in Germany on platforms like ImmoScout24, Immowelt, Immonet, eBay Kleinanzeigen, and WG-Gesucht and instantly delivers the results to you via Slack, Telegram, Email, Discord or ntfy, so you can focus on the more important things in life ;)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pbakaus/impeccable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable
Language: javascript
The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pcottle/learnGitBranching
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pcottle/learnGitBranching
Language: javascript
An interactive git visualization and tutorial. Aspiring students of git can use this app to educate and challenge themselves towards mastery of git!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xuanyustudio/LocalMiniDrama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xuanyustudio/LocalMiniDrama
Language: javascript
🎬 seedance2接入 开源本地 AI 短剧 & 漫剧生成工具 —— 从故事到成片一站式完成，数据不出本机，短剧工作流管理平台，高灵活度，AI真人剧，AI漫剧本地搞定。 Open-source local AI short drama maker: story → storyboard → video, fully offline, your data stays yours. 纳米流水线
